title: Spring Boot Actuator
codeExample:
# application.yml
management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,loggers
      base-path: /actuator
  endpoint:
    health:
      show-details: when_authorized

# Custom info in application.properties
info.app.name=@project.name@
info.app.version=@project.version@
info.app.description=My Spring Boot Application

quiz.question: Which dependency adds monitoring endpoints to a Spring Boot application?
Which endpoint allows viewing and changing log levels at runtime?
